content: Modern Python CLI distribution: pyproject.toml (hatchling or setuptools backend) with a console_scripts entry point, installed by end users via pipx (isolated venv per tool, avoids global env pollution). For signed reproducible releases: PyPI Trusted Publishing (OIDC, no long-lived API tokens) + Sigstore attestations via gh-action-pypi-publish v1.11+, published automatically on release.
